channel.description: Recent content in mathematics on Christos Tsanikidis - Machine Learning, Mathematics, Computer Science, Finance

item.title: Counting the number of elements in sequences through compression
item.description: Counting the elements in a sequence is a common problem in mathematics, computer science, and programming. Although in many cases this appears tricky, there’s a simple method to make the task straightforward, requiring only basic math skills. Examples Before Theory Let’s dive into a few examples before explaining the method precisely. Example 1: {5, 6, 7, …, 100} First, find a function that maps integers (ideally starting from 0) to the elements above.
